name: Corn and Cheese Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bacon into 1/2-inch strips and fry until crisp. Drain.
2. Place the bacon fat in a heavy pot.
3. Drain the corn, light and dark kidney beans, and tomatoes, reserving the liquid.
4. Add the vegetable liquids, onion, and green pepper to the bacon fat. Cook until the liquid is reduced by half.
5. Stir in the corn, beans, tomatoes, chili powder, cumin, and salt. Heat to a medium heat.
6. Stir in the grated cheese and cooked bacon. Serve.
